purpose: Attract talent to join the Peerloop team. Showcase company culture, values, and open positions.

dataRequirements.fields_used: id, title, department, location, type, description, requirements, posted_at

sections.title: Hero
items: Subheadline: "Help us make quality education accessible to everyone"

sections.title: Team Life
items: Photos and quotes from team members

sections.title: Open Positions
items: Job cards with title, location, type

userStories: US-G060: Find job opportunities at Peerloop
notes: Consider integrating with ATS (Lever, Greenhouse, etc.)

hero.headline: Join the Learning Revolution
hero.subheadline: Help us make quality education accessible to everyone, everywhere.

reasons.title: Mission That Matters
reasons.description: We're solving the 2 Sigma Problem—making 1-on-1 tutoring accessible to everyone. Your work directly impacts learners and teachers worldwide.

reasons.title: Remote-First Culture
reasons.description: Work from anywhere. We're a distributed team across 8 time zones, with async-first communication and flexible schedules.

reasons.title: Growth & Learning
reasons.description: $2,000 annual learning budget, access to all Peerloop courses, and career development programs. We practice what we preach.

reasons.title: Real Impact, Fast
reasons.description: As an early-stage company, you'll shape the product and culture. No bureaucracy, just meaningful work with talented teammates.

values.title: Learn Constantly
values.description: We're curious and humble. We learn from users, data, and each other.

values.title: Teach Generously
values.description: We share knowledge freely. Documentation, pair programming, and mentorship are core to how we work.

values.title: Build for Everyone
values.description: Accessibility isn't an afterthought. We design for users across all backgrounds and abilities.

values.title: Move with Urgency
values.description: Education inequality is urgent. We ship fast, learn quickly, and iterate constantly.

items.title: Health & Wellness
items.description: Medical, dental, vision insurance. Mental health support included.

items.title: Unlimited PTO
items.description: Take the time you need. We trust you to manage your own schedule.

items.title: Remote Work Stipend
items.description: $500 for home office setup, $100/month for internet and coworking.

items.title: Learning Budget
items.description: $2,000/year for courses, books, conferences—anything that helps you grow.

items.title: Equity
items.description: Meaningful equity stake. We succeed together.

items.title: Parental Leave
items.description: 16 weeks paid leave for all new parents.

items.title: Team Retreats
items.description: Annual in-person gathering (fully paid) to connect and collaborate.

items.title: Free Peerloop
items.description: Full access to all courses and tutoring for you and your family.

teamQuotes.name: Maya Rodriguez
teamQuotes.quote: I've worked at big tech and startups. Peerloop has the best of both—smart colleagues, real impact, and no BS.

teamQuotes.name: David Kim
teamQuotes.quote: Every feature we ship helps someone learn or earn. That kind of meaning is rare.

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Build core platform features using React, Node.js, and Cloudflare Workers. Own significant product areas end-to-end.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Design intuitive experiences for students, teachers, and creators. From user research to high-fidelity prototypes.
requirements: Strong portfolio showing end-to-end design process

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Create compelling content that drives organic traffic and establishes Peerloop as a thought leader in education technology.
requirements: EdTech or education background a plus

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: Help course creators and Student-Teachers succeed on the platform. Onboard, support, and grow our most valuable users.
requirements: 2+ years of customer success or account management
Experience with Intercom, Zendesk, or similar

noOpenings.headline: Don't See Your Role?
noOpenings.description: We're always looking for exceptional people. Send us your resume and tell us how you'd contribute.
